buildResults.message: Strict MLB-B1.0 structure was unavailable, so a baseline 3-leg MLB slate was built from top available scored games. Leg grades remain honest.
buildResults.candidateFilterPolicy: Candidates are the post-score subset where frozen=true and selected grade is MLB_STRONG or MLB_LEAN. This full board shows the pre-filter scoring pass for every MLB game.
